# Transcrição: 13-How To Set Up Automated Rules For Round #1

## [00:00 - 01:54]

So another option that we have when we're optimizing a rapid fire test is that we can create rules so that we don't have to be in there all the time, especially if you've got quite a few things on your plate and your freelancer and you're doing everything yourself. So Facebook has automated rules where we can actually tell Facebook to turn specific ads off that are not performing the way that we want. Okay, so what you're going to do is go under the campaign that is in question. You're going to click on create rule. And then what we're going to do is here I'm going to click on all active ads. And I'm going to leave this as turn off ads. And here I'm going to select CPC. So if my CPC is greater than 150 and also we have a reach of 500 in the last seven days, turn off the ads. So I can also choose to get an email from Facebook notifying me that the an ad has been turned off because it didn't meet the criteria. I'm going to name this as well. And try to name it something that's going to be very clear for you to spot if you're ever trying to manage your automated rules later on because that can be quite difficult. So you can also see here under the automated rules tab in our business manager, we can see the automated rule that we have created and we can edit it here, turn it off, etc.
